prompt: Edit this studio worktable photo into an intimate, imperfect close moment. Tighten and slightly off-kilter the framing for a handheld feel. Low raking window light with faint dust motes in the air. The printed cotton is bunched to show real woven texture and a few honest creases, with a thimble and a threaded needle resting on it and one stray thread curling away. A tiny nick in the wood and a faint coffee ring. Shallow depth of field, soft focus falloff. Keep the warm honey Mediterranean grade and soft directional window daylight of the source. Natural unfinished-wood worktable. The hero fabric is Me + Lia's small blue-and-white floral printed cotton. Make it look like a real, candid photograph of a working dressmaking atelier mid-task, not a styled stock flatlay. 35mm film look, gentle natural grain, realistic shallow depth of field, authentic asymmetry and imperfection. No text, no logos, no watermarks. Portrait framing.
